summary: Imported Claude session "latest prompt" from history.

instruction_artifacts.content:
# project claude instructions

Keep context concise.

provenance: Detects documented CLAUDE.md and settings.json locations. Managed settings and MCP config files are not included yet.
Session inventory comes from ~/.claude/history.jsonl. This is a best-effort history-based view, not a full raw session export.
warnings: Claude import is history-based. Raw transcript, tool events, and token usage were not available from local session storage.
